allow: Bash(docker exec auto-traitor-traitor-db psql -U traitor -d autotraitor -c "SELECT exchange, COUNT\(*\), MIN\(portfolio_value\), MAX\(portfolio_value\), AVG\(portfolio_value\) FROM portfolio_snapshots GROUP BY exchange ORDER BY exchange;")
Bash(docker exec auto-traitor-traitor-db psql -U traitor -d autotraitor -c "DELETE FROM portfolio_snapshots WHERE exchange = ''ibkr''; SELECT ''deleted ibkr snapshots'';")

Bash(docker exec auto-traitor-traitor-db psql -U traitor -d autotraitor -c "SELECT exchange, COUNT\(*\), ROUND\(MIN\(portfolio_value\)::numeric,2\) as min, ROUND\(MAX\(portfolio_value\)::numeric,2\) as max FROM portfolio_snapshots GROUP BY exchange;")

Bash(docker exec auto-traitor-traitor-db psql -U traitor -d autotraitor -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\), MIN\(ts\), MAX\(ts\) FROM portfolio_snapshots WHERE exchange = ''coinbase'' AND portfolio_value <= 10.5;")

Bash(docker exec auto-traitor-traitor-db psql -U traitor -d autotraitor -c "DELETE FROM portfolio_snapshots WHERE exchange = ''coinbase'' AND portfolio_value <= 10.5; SELECT COUNT\(*\), ROUND\(MIN\(portfolio_value\)::numeric,2\) as min, ROUND\(MAX\(portfolio_value\)::numeric,2\) as max FROM portfolio_snapshots WHERE exchange = ''coinbase'';")
